name: bill
description: Track billable work hours per client — log time entries, edit, tally, convert logged hours to Stripe invoices
author: CupBots
intent: Log billable work, track hours, edit bill items, tally pending amounts, create Stripe invoices from pending items, list clients
not_intent: Send standalone Stripe invoices without bill items (use /invoice), manage tasks (use /task), track expenses

marketplace.tagline: Track billable work from chat — log, edit, tally, invoice
